category_sources: source_facts.description identifies OWAMP as an implementation of the One-Way Active Measurement Protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is owamp; source_facts.description expands the protocol name.
docs_sources: Official Internet2 OWAMP cookbook is project documentation; official perfSONAR GitHub README is an additional source surface.
repo_sources: Official perfSONAR GitHub repository for owamp describes it as a tool for one-way or two-way active measurements; perfSONAR download page points source code to the perfSONAR GitHub organization.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names One-Way Active Measurement Protocol; official perfSONAR materials describe OWAMP in network measurement and latency testing contexts.
